instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Can I Take a Loan Against a Life Insurance Policy?
Meta Description: Loans against life insurance policies are only available in specified conventional policies, such as money back and endowment plans, as per their t&c.
Keywords: loan against life insurance policy, loan against policy,  policy loan
________________________________________________________
Introduction
In India, taking out a loan against a life insurance policy is uncommon. One of the main reasons for this is because the vast majority of policyholders are unaware of this choice. Consumer awareness has increased significantly as a result of the loan providers' marketing initiatives.
Life insurance plans nowadays are quite adaptable. They now have another extremely useful use, in addition to the protective cover. In the event of a financial emergency, policyholders may now borrow against their insurance plans. Here are some of the most crucial things to know about this facility if you're searching for a loan and have a Life Insurance policy:
Are all Life Insurance policies eligible for loan?
Term insurance policies and unit-linked plans are not eligible for loans, according to the IRDAI criteria. If you have a typical insurance policy, such as a money-back plan, an endowment plan, or a full Life Insurance policy, you may take out a policy loan. To learn more about the sorts of insurance policies that are eligible for this loan, contact the lender.
How much loan amount can I get against my Life Insurance policy?
The surrender value of the policy, rather than the whole Sum Assured, is taken into account when issuing such loans. The surrender value is only obtained once you have paid premiums for at least three years on the insurance.
As a loan on the insurance policy, most lenders provide 80 percent to 90 percent of the surrender value.
What is the eligibility for Life Insurance loans?
The qualifying conditions for obtaining a loan against life insurance policy are minimal as compared to other forms of loans such as Personal Loans. The most crucial requirement is to make sure your insurance policy is accepted for a loan by your chosen lender.
This lending programme is open to businesses, partnerships, sole proprietorships and HUFs in addition to individuals.
How to apply for a loan against a life insurance policy online?
Borrowers may now apply for a loan on their insurance policy online with most lenders. If you have a loan-eligible insurance policy, you'll need to fill out the loan agreement in order to apply for a loan online. Many lenders set up a Current Account for borrowers to use to pay back their loans. You'll also be required to complete the account opening procedures.
What are the documents required to apply for a loan against a life insurance policy online?
To apply for a loan, you must produce the original policy documentation, as well as evidence of residence, identification, and income. In addition, you must file a 'Deed of Assignment,' which assigns your insurance policy to your lender.
Wrapping Up
While the most important advantage of a Life Insurance policy is the protection it provides, the borrowing capacity is a useful addition. Examine the lender's terms and conditions before applying for a Loan Against Policy to prevent any future misunderstandings.
Sources:
https://www.icicibank.com/blogs/life-Insurance/loan-against-life-insurance-policy.page?
